title: scutellaria orientalis
intro: Scutellaria orientalis, also known as Baikal skullcap, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria orientalis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and protecting against various diseases such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. Scutellaria orientalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in health food stores and online.
